---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve the framework
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---
**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is (e.g., Lattice matrix failing to generate, Zeroize function not clearing memory).

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior.

**Environment:**
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python Version: [e.g. 3.11]
- Framework Version: v0.1.8
